title: Workout 6x regiment — Mon-Sat split with effective-reps protocol
html:
TL;DR

  • Yahir's Dec 2022 Mon-Sat workout split: chest / arm / legs / back / shoulder / all-around — 6 days on, 1 rest.
  • Two named protocols: Ignition Set (weight for 12 reps to failure, at the start) and Effective Reps (15-sec breaks, reps to failure, no limit on rest count).
  • Hard rules: rest/pause after ignition sets, 3-5 minutes between exercises, push harder + focus on proper form.
  • ER counts per exercise are explicit: 20 ER for most, 10 ER for compound lifts (squats, RDLs, weighted dips).
  • This is Yahir's earliest formal training-protocol artifact in the vault — antecedent to 2024 12 18 Building Phase Body Blueprint and 2024 02 07 Successful Cut two years later.

The split

Day Focus Exercises (ER count)
Mon Chest DB Bench Press 20, Cable Crossover 20, Thumbs-Up DB Incline 20, Weighted Dips 10, Static Hold Push-Ups 20
Tue Arm Barbell Curls 20, DB Jim Press 20, Cross-Body Hammer Curls 20, Bicep Chin-Ups → Neg Chin Hangs 10, Weighted Upright Dip → Paused Dips 10
Wed Legs Seated Leg Curls 20, Calf Raises 20, Leg Extensions 20, Squats 10, RDLs 10
Thu Back BB Rows 20, Lat Pulldowns 20, Seated Cable Rows 20, DB High Pulls 20, Underhand-Grip ROM Pulldowns 20
Fri Shoulder DB/BB Overhead Press → Push Press 20, DB Lateral Raises → Static Hold 20, DB Hip Huggers 20, Cable Stretch Front Raises 20, Face Pull Raises → Face Pulls 20
Sat All-Around Back-Hyperextensions, Farmer Walks, Lat Pulldowns, Reverse Preacher Curls, Pull-Ups

The Saturday "all-around" day is rep-count-free in the doc — Yahir leaves it as a maintenance / recovery / hobby day.

The protocols

Ignition Set: select a weight for 12 reps that causes failure, performed at the beginning of the lift. Sets the neural primer.

Effective Reps (ER): after the ignition set, take 15-second breaks and continue reps to failure with no limit on the number of rest cycles. The ER count (20 ER, 10 ER) is the target total reps, not the set count — you do as many sets as it takes to hit that number with 15s breaks.

Hard rules:

  • Rest-pause after ignition sets for each exercise
  • 3-5 minutes between exercises
  • Push harder + focus on proper form

The "no limit on rest count" is the key insight — it removes set-count as the variable and replaces it with total volume to a target rep count, paced by short breaks. This is essentially myo-rep / cluster-set methodology, before Yahir would have called it that.

Why it matters in the graph

This is the earliest fitness-protocol artifact in the vault — Dec 2022, Yahir age ~20. It precedes:

  • 2024 02 07 Successful Cut — Feb 2024 paired cut with kyle nguyen (uses macros, not protocols)
  • 2024 12 18 Building Phase Body Blueprint — Dec 2024 first intentional bulk (alternates muscle-group emphasis, longer rest cycles, adds supplement stack + sleep pillar)

The 2022 doc is protocol-pure: just exercises, ER counts, rest rules. By 2024 the docs have expanded into macros, sleep, supplements, and cycle-planning. This shows Yahir's fitness practice maturing from "what to do today" → "how to engineer the year."

This doc is also the bedrock of the from fitness to software the brotein arc synthesis — the credibility that made brotein feel like a product Yahir could ship is established by 2 solid years of disciplined training that started right here.

Privacy

No credentials. Four screenshots referenced (likely form demos or progress photos), image data only.
